overrideDescriptionKey.english: Draw a damage spell and grant it +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower].
overrideDescriptionKey.french: Piochez un sort de dégâts, qui gagne +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower].
overrideDescriptionKey.german: Ziehe einen Schadenszauber und wende +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] darauf an.
overrideDescriptionKey.russian: Вытяните чары урона. К ним добавится [magicpower] х[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage].
overrideDescriptionKey.portuguese: Compra um feitiço de dano e concede +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower] a ele.
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese: 抽一张伤害性法术牌并使其获得 +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage][magicpower]。
overrideDescriptionKey.spanish: Roba un hechizo de daño y añade +[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower].
overrideDescriptionKey.japanese: ダメージ呪文をドローして、+[effect0.upgrade.bonusdamage] [magicpower]を付与する。
